424 M5C M5C_TURN_REPO (M5C) Turning/Repositioning Program CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - turning/repositioning program. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
425 M5D M5D_INTER_SKN_PROB (M5D) Nutrition/Hydration Intervention to Manage Skin Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: skin treatments in last 7 days - nutrition/hydration intervention. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
